title: CBB Rulebook Volume 5 Ancillary Service Providers Authorisation Requirements for Payment Service Providers
summary: Requires payment service providers to obtain prior CBB approval for CDMs or kiosk terminals and maintain robust technological infrastructure and 24/7 electronic funds transfer system access.

theme_notes.digital_finance.payments_emoney: Authorisation requirements for payment service provider licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Payment Service Provider Rulebook Requirements
